content: Conversation-end-by-inactivity: industry pattern is server-side timers/scheduled jobs, not client timers (browser/tab may be closed; SW is ephemeral). Each inbound transcript update resets a last_activity timestamp; a periodic job (cron/queue with delayed jobs, e.g. Redis-backed) finds conversations with last_activity older than threshold (typical 10min–24h; async chat products use hours) and emits a conversation-ended event that triggers the diagnostic. Timers must be reset on each message and handle races in multi-instance deployments.
